candidates.why: A populated operating D&A line appears separately at the same level as operating expense rows and outside the selected COGS row 'Voyage expenses and commissions', so it appears not to be embedded in the selected COGS bucket. There are two identically labeled rows, and the upper populated row appears to be the summary/total because in later periods it matches the lower depreciation row plus 'Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets'.
A separate operating amortisation line exists, but the statement does not indicate whether it relates to COGS versus SG&A; assigning it to COGS would be less certain.
This label is present but unpopulated, so it should not be selected.

variables.notes: OK. Selected only the summary depreciation row for later add-back to COGS because the chosen COGS parent bucket is narrowly 'Voyage expenses and commissions' and does not appear to contain this separate same-level depreciation line. Excluded 'Amortisation intangible assets' because bucket attribution to COGS is not clear. Avoided the duplicate lower 'Depreciation tangible assets' row to prevent double counting.

candidates.why: Although this is a separate operating D&A row, the wording does not indicate SG&A/admin linkage and it appears more likely to be broad operating or vessel-related depreciation rather than specifically tied to the selected SG&A bucket.
A separate operating amortisation row exists, but there is no evidence that it belongs specifically to 'General and administrative expenses' rather than another operating bucket.
This label is unpopulated and should not be selected.

variables.notes: Manually Added. No row is clearly identifiable as SG&A-specific D&A relative to the selected parent row 'General and administrative expenses'. Conservative choice is to add nothing separately to XSGA to avoid misallocating broad operating depreciation/amortisation.
